description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into this pair of black socks from puma. Made of soft cotton knit fabric, this sock can be worn both for sporting events and casual days. Made of cotton knit fabric for all-day comfort, easy stretch and sweat-free wear Padded footbed for cushioned comfort Seamless stitch for abrasion-free wear Rib knit mouth with puma Leaping cat logo, white tipping, and a roomy toe area for superior comfort and durability sock care Machine wash cold in 40 degree using mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not iron, dry clean or tumble dry Dry in shade
